# Zhen Subnet
> The calibration layer for digital twins on Bittensor

## What it does
Zhen is a decentralized platform for competitive simulation model calibration. Miners optimize simplified digital twin parameters against complex ground truth simulations. Validators verify accuracy on held-out data using industry-standard metrics (CVRMSE, NMBE, R-squared).

The architecture is domain-agnostic. Any domain with a complex simulation and a simplified model can be added as a test case. The first vertical is building energy simulation using BOPTEST emulators and RC network thermal models.

## Key concepts
- Two-model architecture: complex emulator (ground truth) + simplified model (calibration target)
- Domain-agnostic scoring: works on any time-series calibration problem
- Deterministic verification: all validators produce identical scores
- Miner-local simulation: miners run all simulations on their own hardware
- Pluggable test case registry: new domains = new emulator + simplified model

## Current vertical: building energy
- Scoring: CVRMSE 50% (rank-based, top-K=5 with base=0.5 exponential decay, ceiling CVRMSE=10.0), NMBE 25%, R-squared 15%, convergence efficiency 10%
- Score pipeline: raw composites -> 5% relative floor vs max -> power-law (exponent 2) -> normalize sum=1
- Ground truth: BOPTEST containerized building emulators
- Simplified models: RC network thermal models with dual heating and cooling modes
- Active manifest (v2.0.0): bestest_air (Denver, CO, USA climate). bestest_hydronic_heat_pump and bestest_hydronic are retained on disk for integration test fixtures but not in the active rotation.
- Spec version: 6 (internal protocol/scoring version, orthogonal to WEIGHT_VERSION_KEY=1000 used for Yuma aggregation)

## Deployment
- Docker: Dockerfile.miner, Dockerfile.validator, docker-compose.yml with profiles
- PM2: scripts/start_validator.sh, scripts/start_miner.sh, scripts/auto_update.sh
- Health: GET /health on port 8080 (validator)
- Alerts: ZHEN_ALERT_WEBHOOK environment variable for Discord/Slack notifications

- Mining Guide: docs/MINE.md
- Scoring Formula: docs/SCORING.md
- Validator Setup: docs/VALIDATE.md
